description: Banco de Valores S.A. provides various services in financial trusts and mutual funds in Argentina. It offers financial trustee services; and advisory services for structuring and placement of financial trusts, as well as shares and debt issuance, and rating services. The company is also involved in the custodian of assets in non-financial trusts for institutional clients; and Open-ended and closed-end mutual funds products. In addition, it engages in the financing operations; and provision of integral settlement and clearing agents services, as well as corporate, API, and investment banking services. The company was incorporated in 1977 and is based in Buenos Aires, Argentina.
